name: Rosa Marques
bio: My name is Rosa Marques and I am the Kindergarten-Preschool teacher at Escola Portuguesa Nossa Senhora de Fatima. I have dedicated almost 40 years to building strong connections with both typical and developmentally challenged children and their families.

My goal is to spark wonder and develop early language skills in a playful environment. I introduce cultural experiences and love to play traditional games. We learn thru story telling and bringing creativity to all our activities. I hope that your child will surprise family members with the few words that they have learned each week and strengthen the bond they have to our heritage.

I grew up in Vancouver and am also an alumnus of this school as I attended for 9 years back in the 80's. Those classes aided in my move to Portugal where I lived with my husband and son for 18 years. Upon our return to Vancouver, I joined the Portuguese School team and have enjoyed creating a safe and happy space for our little ones. I look forward to a wonderful partnership in your child's education.
